title: thelypodium integrifolium subsp. gracilipes
intro: Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. gracilipes, also known as the slender beaked thelypodium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, among others. The herbal preparations of Thelypodium integrifolium subsp. gracilipes typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices.
